summary: Verified KNSelect auto-searchable combobox enhancement. Large list (Customer dropdown w/ 6 options) on Special Orders Create renders as Popover+cmdk Command combobox: trigger=BUTTON role=combobox, popover opens with 'Cari...' search input, all 6 options present (including '-- Pilih Customer --' as option-empty), typing filters correctly (ZZZZ→'Tidak ada hasil'; 'Tek'→2 results), selecting emits the value, closes popover, updates trigger label, and downstream form-help (phone/city) populates. data-testid contract preserved. No console.error during flow. Small KNSelect path (Satuan ~3 options on the same form) renders as standard Radix Select with default 'meter' — no regression, no blank screen. No blank screens on Beranda, SO list, SO Create.

design_issues.screen: Special Order Create form (and any page that triggers Radix Popover/cmdk)
issues: React dev-mode overlay surfaces 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' as an 'Uncaught runtime error' banner when the combobox popover opens. This is a benign warning (no console.error, no functional impact, will not appear in prod build) but is visually disruptive during development. Optional mitigation: install a global window.onerror handler that swallows this specific ResizeObserver message, or upgrade @radix-ui/react-popover/cmdk.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Silence the benign 'ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications' dev overlay that appears when the Popover opens — add a window.error/error-event filter or update Radix Popover/cmdk versions.
critical_code_review_comments: KNSelect.jsx is clean (~180 lines), well-documented in Indonesian, and the empty-value sentinel pattern is only applied on the Radix path — the Combobox path correctly passes empty string straight through (verified via the option-empty testid rendering and click path).

Option testid generation uses `String(opt.value) || 'empty'`. This works for '' but would collide if a real value of '0' (number coerced) were ever passed — currently no caller does this, but consider an explicit nullish check to be safer.
The Combobox uses `value={`${label} ${value}`}` for cmdk filtering — this is correct and lets users search either label or id. Good UX.
Trigger button doesn't include a visible focus ring style (relies on className from caller). Confirm Tailwind 'field' class includes focus-visible ring for keyboard accessibility.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for the KNSelect feature under test

test_credentials: admin@kainnusantara.id / demo12345 — login form pre-filled, click [data-testid=login-submit-button]
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded customers (5) on Special Orders Create.
context_for_next_testing_agent: KNSelect combobox path is verified working on Customer dropdown of Special Orders Create (data-testid 'sord-customer-select'). Testid contract: trigger=<testid>, popover=<testid>-popover, search=<testid>-search, options=<testid>-option-<value or 'empty' for empty string>. To reach the form: login → expand sidebar group 'PENJUALAN' via [data-testid=nav-group-toggle-penjualan] → click [data-testid=nav-special-orders] → click [data-testid=create-special-order-btn]. PO Create wasn't reached in this session (pembelian sub-nav not auto-expanded after group toggle in time) but the same code path is exercised by the Customer combobox, so no additional KNSelect logic remains untested.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works as designed. Only finding is the benign React-dev ResizeObserver overlay (unrelated to KNSelect logic; standard side-effect of Radix Popover layout measurements in dev). No production impact.
